english_text:
Battery Compartment
Hour
Minutes
Seconds
Oscillator
Chrome Solenoid
alt_text: Photograph of the internal mechanism of a quartz clock, with red and blue arrows labelling the battery compartment, the hour/minutes/seconds gears, the oscillator, and the chrome solenoid. A teaching analogy for design/teleology arguments.
notes: Used as a teleological analogy (clock-maker argument) for divine design — typical in deen-aur-science (religion-and-science) sermons.
